## xsh put identity

Store SSH identity file in database

### Synopsis

Store SSH identity file in database which will be used for making connection with hosts

```
xsh put identity [flags]
```

### Examples

```
xsh put identity [name] [path to private key file]
```

  -h, --help   help for identity
```

```
